scripts.packages:type-check: mkdir -p .tmp && TMPDIR="$PWD/.tmp" ./apps/web/node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && TMPDIR="$PWD/.tmp" ./apps/web/node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json && TMPDIR="$PWD/.tmp" ./apps/web/node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p packages/config/tsconfig.json && TMPDIR="$PWD/.tmp" ./apps/web/node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p packages/types/tsconfig.json && TMPDIR="$PWD/.tmp" ./apps/web/node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p packages/sdk/tsconfig.json
scripts.packages:build: mkdir -p .tmp && TMPDIR="$PWD/.tmp" ./apps/web/node_modules/.bin/tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && TMPDIR="$PWD/.tmp" ./apps/web/node_modules/.bin/tsc -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json && TMPDIR="$PWD/.tmp" ./apps/web/node_modules/.bin/tsc -p packages/config/tsconfig.json && TMPDIR="$PWD/.tmp" ./apps/web/node_modules/.bin/tsc -p packages/types/tsconfig.json && TMPDIR="$PWD/.tmp" ./apps/web/node_modules/.bin/tsc -p packages/sdk/tsconfig.json
